clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the macroscopic functions of the salience and limbic networks, mediating emotional responsivity, interoception, threat detection, and autonomic arousal.
These terms map onto the corticostriatal circuitry responsible for computing incentive salience, processing reinforcement, and driving goal-directed decision-making.

These terms converge functionally on the default mode network, which underlies internally directed representations of the self, autobiographical memory, and the complex processing of interpersonal interactions.
